purpose: Marketing and awareness outlet database format for Pancake Robot, optimized for a marketing agent to prioritize, pitch, and track outreach while avoiding outlets with explicit anti-AI-music positions.

uploaded_brand_profile_summary.name: Pancake Robot
uploaded_brand_profile_summary.core_audience: Kids 4-7, with secondary 7-10 and parent/caregiver approval
uploaded_brand_profile_summary.brand_promise: Every morning is the start of an adventure — and Pancake Robot is your best friend for the whole wild ride.
uploaded_brand_profile_summary.positioning: A warm, energetic, playfully absurd kids music character at the intersection of robots, breakfast/cooking, and silly adventure.
must_have_marketing_implications: Lead with the character and parent-trust safety, not with AI novelty
Every pitch should emphasize movement, singalong, and repeatable kid participation
Best channels are kindie music, family radio, preschool teachers, parent activity creators, and screen-free kids audio
Avoid edgy, ironic, scary, adult, or controversy-led channels
Always have a 15-45 second hook clip ready because Pancake Robot’s value is easiest to understand in motion/audio

brand_source.citation_note: Built from the uploaded Pancake Robot brand profile and current public research performed on 2026-05-02.

ai_music_outreach_policy.default_filter: Prioritize outlets/platforms with no public anti-AI stance found or explicit AI-with-disclosure support. Exclude platforms that explicitly reject fully AI-generated music unless a future release has clear human-authorship evidence.
ai_music_outreach_policy.disclosure_principle: Be transparent when asked or when platform policy requires it, but do not make AI the hero of parent-facing pitches. The hero is the original character, kid-safe design, catchiness, and usefulness for families/teachers.
ai_music_outreach_policy.recommended_disclosure_blurb: Pancake Robot is an original character music project using AI-assisted production tools under human creative direction. We own/control the brand, visuals, lyrics/prompt direction, release packaging, and distribution, and we avoid impersonation, copyrighted character references, or mass-spam releases.

risk_labels.low: Explicitly accepts AI music with disclosure, owned channel, or platform policy allows AI under rights/anti-spam rules
risk_labels.medium: No explicit anti-AI stance found; verify before outreach
risk_labels.high: Major brand, taste-sensitive outlet, or explicit anti-AI / human-authorship requirement
risk_labels.avoid: Do not use for current Pancake Robot AI-generated tracks

hard_exclusions_current.name: Musosoup
hard_exclusions_current.reason: Explicitly does not accept fully AI-generated music

hard_exclusions_current.name: Bandcamp
hard_exclusions_current.reason: Reported ban on music created wholly or substantially by AI

campaign_lanes.name: Kindie earned media
campaign_lanes.goal: Credible reviews, premieres, radio plays, and parent-trust mentions

campaign_lanes.name: Playlist and curator platforms
campaign_lanes.goal: Scalable discovery without spending weeks on manual curator scraping

campaign_lanes.name: Parent activity creators
campaign_lanes.goal: Drive awareness through practical household/classroom uses

campaign_lanes.name: Teacher and classroom resources
campaign_lanes.goal: Earn repeat listens through routines: cleanup, morning, movement breaks, counting/colors/shapes

campaign_lanes.name: Owned social channels
campaign_lanes.goal: Build proof, consistency, and retargetable audience before big outreach

campaign_lanes.name: Awards and trust badges
campaign_lanes.goal: Create parent-trust proof for landing pages, pitches, and DistroKid/Spotify/YouTube copy

priority_definitions.P0: Start here; high fit or mandatory release hygiene
priority_definitions.P1: Strong fit; use once assets are ready
priority_definitions.P3: Only after traction or with a strong trend/story hook

recommended_contact_safety_rules: Do not hide AI use if platform requires disclosure or asks directly
Do not pitch children’s music into adult/edgy outlets
Do not mass-send identical copy; personalize at least category, song, and why-fit
Do not contact outlets whose profile explicitly rejects AI-generated music
Do not imply endorsement, review, playlist add, award, or child-development benefit unless actually obtained
Do not use manipulative child-targeted CTAs; pitch to parents/teachers/curators, not directly to kids

outlet_targets.name: Zooglobble

contact.submission_path: Site includes 'Submitting Music for Review' section; confirm current process before sending

audience.primary: parents and kindie music fans

why_it_fits_pancake_robot: Directly focused on 'Kids Music Worth Sharing' and kindie music discovery
Best-fit earned media target for a Pancake Robot single, album, or video premiere
Audience is already primed for parent-tolerable, playful, high-quality children’s music
best_pancake_robot_angles: Kindie earworm for kids that parents can tolerate
Premiere a 30-45 second music video clip or visualizer
Seasonal songs: summer, chores, breakfast, school morning
outlet_targets.sample_pitch_hook: A new kindie character at the intersection of robots, breakfast, and absurd morning adventure — designed for 4-7 year-olds but parent-safe enough for repeat play.
assets_to_send: Spotify/Apple/YouTube streaming link or private preview
30-45 sec vertical hook clip with readable captions
3000x3000 album art
15 sec chorus clip for Reels/TikTok/Shorts
kid-safe lyric excerpt
one-paragraph parent-safe story behind the song
AI-use disclosure note: transparent but confident; avoid defensive framing
visual stills of Pancake Robot with text-safe margins
optional activity card / printable tied to song theme

ai_music_stance.notes: No explicit anti-AI music stance found in reviewed public snippets. Because this is a taste-driven kindie editorial site, disclose carefully and lead with human creative direction, parent-safety, and original character IP.
ai_music_stance.recommended_action: Use transparent AI disclosure only after confirming the outlet accepts AI-assisted or AI-generated music.

outreach_sequence.goal: Ask if they are open to reviewing/featuring one kid-safe song and one 30-sec clip
Light nudge with hook clip only
Send public links and parent-safe proof points

kindie_radio_blog.subject: Pancake Robot — new kid-safe kindie song for breakfast dance chaos
kindie_radio_blog.when_to_use: Zooglobble, Spare the Rock, SMCB, Kids Can Groove, ICAN

parent_activity_creator.subject: Song + printable idea for {{theme}}
parent_activity_creator.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I’m building Pancake Robot, a kids music character for preschool/early elementary families. I thought this might fit your audience because the song can be paired with a simple activity: {{activity_idea}}.

The clip is short, bright, and gesture-based: {{specific_hook}}. I can send a printable, captioned Reel/TikTok clip, and a clean parent-facing description.

Open to a sponsored post, activity bundle, or simple test collaboration if it fits your calendar.

KC
parent_activity_creator.when_to_use: Busy Toddler, Happy Toddler Playtime, Days with Grey, Goodnight Fox, TheDadLab

teacher_resource.subject: Free K-2 movement song/activity kit: {{song_title}}
teacher_resource.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I’m sharing a free classroom-ready song/activity kit from Pancake Robot, a kid-safe music character built around movement, simple words, and silly routines.

This one is designed for {{classroom_use_case}}. It includes:
- Song link
- Lyrics with movement cues
- Printable activity/QR sheet
- 5-minute teacher instructions

The goal is a low-prep transition/movement break that feels fun, not instructional.

KC
teacher_resource.when_to_use: WeAreTeachers, preschool/daycare newsletters, homeschool blogs, TpT resource landing page

playlist_platform_pitch.short_pitch_500_chars: Pancake Robot is a bright, parent-safe kids/kindie track built around breakfast adventure, robot sounds, and a kid-copyable movement hook. The chorus lands fast, uses simple singalong words, and includes a two-clap + FLIP cue designed for preschool/early elementary dance breaks. AI-assisted production under human creative direction; original character/IP; no impersonation.

next_agent_actions: Create a normalized Airtable/Supabase table from outlet_targets
Add fields for last_verified_at, AI_policy_checked_at, contact_person, email, handle, last_touch, next_touch, campaign_id, and outcome
Run a per-outlet verification pass before sending: current contact route, explicit AI policy, recent activity, and best content format
Generate one release pack per song: streaming links, private preview, short hook clip, social caption, printable/activity, AI disclosure, and one-line parent-safe value prop
Start with P0 targets and owned channels before expanding into P1/P2
